title: Versioned Migrations, Expand-Contract Changes, and Rollback Evidence · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed operations review reconstructs versioned migrations, expand-contract changes, and rollback evidence from revision, tenant, source URL, request validators, response bytes, parsed identity, transaction, lease, state transition, output, failure, cleanup, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for rehearsed schema and data migration chain after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debuggin…
objectives: Keep ordered immutable migration files, checksums, ownership, lock behavior, and applied-state inspection under revision control.
Decide transaction boundaries from each PostgreSQL operation and separate concurrent index, long data, and lock-sensitive work.
Stage additive schema, backfill, dual-read or dual-write, validation, cutover, cleanup, and old-version compatibility.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Feed Go Migration Recovery
steps.instruction:
review case — A review Go team handles case 4313 during a multilingual university archive import. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove immutable migrations, expand-contract compatibility, bounded backfill, and recovery; the release claim must bind source, migrations, dependencies, binary, image, configuration, and restored state; then interleave one schedule, lease, fencing, goroutine, cancellation, or shutdown path and prove ownership. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Test fresh install, upgrade, interrupted backfill, retry, rollback or forward repair, backup restore, and version skew.

Inspect the Feed Go Migration Recovery trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?
